title: schizachyrium myosurus
intro: Schizachyrium myosurus, also known as Little Bluestem, is a perennial grass native to North America, belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schizachyrium myosurus include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the leaves and roots of the plant.
